productDisplayName: Reebok Men White Acciomax Sports Shoes
description: The Acciomax is a plush high mileage training shoe for neutral runners. reebok continues to deliver ultimate comfort and a super smooth ride in one package called the Acciomax. This is a highly recommended shoe for larger framed runners.UpperMesh upper with stitched synthetic overlays for lightweight durabilityGilly lacing on the centre for snug FitLushly padded tongue and collar for extremely comfortable fitBrand name behind the collarMidsoleSoft, cushy feel for all day comfortFull length phylon midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with flex grooves for excellent tractionWaffle pattern in the forefoot for superior gripRidges on the arch of the foot for ergonomic fit, with brand mark acting as additional flex grooveRubber outsole extended onto the upper as a toe guardShoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
